## Security checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or passwords committed
- [ ] User input is validated at service boundary (not trusted from gateway headers alone)
- [ ] SQL queries use parameterized statements (no string formatting with user data)
- [ ] New endpoints have appropriate RBAC annotations
- [ ] Dependency changes reviewed for known CVEs (`npm audit` / OWASP scan passed)
